[[Air Marshal]] '''Cargeloch''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Cargeloch was responsible for both leading the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] wing assigned to the airspace around [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] and instructing at the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] base on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The recruits there frequently joked that he slept in his uniform—their jocular frivolity belying recurrent nightmares of the Air Marshal crinkling the leather on his black flight gloves before slapping the recruits across the face for incompetence in the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE]] simulators.<ref name="CatCW" />

Cargeloch earned his rank by blasting a rebellious city to rubble with only four [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]].<ref name="CatCW" />
